a.curator_notes: Series uses 'Die drei ??? Kids' as the primary artist. Excluded: Box sets/compilations (Magische Fälle, Grusel-Fälle, Sommer-Fälle) containing multiple episodes; Adventskalender releases (24 Tage Weihnachtsparade, 24 Tage Elfen-Alarm) which are seasonal collections; Mini-Fälle releases (Mini-Fall 05, Mini-Fall 07) as these are short spinoff stories separate from main numbered episodes. Individual episodes follow 'Folge N: Title' or 'NNN/Title' format. Episode numbers range from 1 to 101+.

b.curator_notes:
Series: Die drei ??? Kids — junior/kids spinoff of Die drei ???, published under its own dedicated Spotify artist (0vLsqW05dyLvjuKKftAEGA). The main "Die drei ???" artist (3meJIgRw7YleJrmbpbJK6S) and "Die drei !!!" artist (2Jc4AEeBTE47KwuKgYOtcL) are separate series and not included here.

Excluded categories:
- Box sets / multi-episode compilations: "Magische Fälle" (292 tracks, ~50 episodes), "Grusel-Fälle" (369 tracks), "Sommer-Fälle" (355 tracks) — each bundle many full episodes together.
- Adventskalender specials: "24 Tage Weihnachtsparade" (54 tracks) and "24 Tage Elfen-Alarm" (29 tracks) — multi-part seasonal compilations, not individual numbered series episodes.
- Mini-Fall sub-series: "Mini-Fall/Hilfe, Geisterzug (Mini-Fall 07)" and "Mini-Fall/Alarm, die Ritter kommen! (Mini-Fall 05)" — short-story spinoff format with its own Mini-Fall numbering, not part of the main episode sequence.
- High-track individual releases that turned out to be standard episodes with many chapter tracks were evaluated individually; Folge 94–101 are included as single episodes despite higher chapter counts.

Episode numbering: early episodes use the format NNN/Title (e.g. 001/Panik im Paradies), later episodes use "Folge N: Title". The episode_pattern covers both formats via a single capture group.
